script_text: The root is the main part of a word.
Knowing the root helps you figure out lots of words.
The root play gives us: play, playing, played, player.
All share the same meaning of play!
Help. Helper. Helpful. Helpless. All from help!
The root tells you they all connect to helping.
Cover the prefix and suffix. What is left? That is the root!
Now you are ready to use root words!
